```{r}
#| label: common-setup
#| include: false

common_candidates <- c("_common.R", file.path("..", "_common.R"), file.path("homework", "_common.R"))
common_file <- common_candidates[file.exists(common_candidates)]
if (length(common_file) == 0) {
  stop("Cannot find homework/_common.R from the current render directory.")
}
source(common_file[1], local = TRUE)
```
